title: Do You Ever
questions: Do you ever wonder what life is all about?
Do you ever type LOL (laugh out loud) when really you aren't laughing?
Do you ever think you have too many things to finish on time?
Do you ever want to throw all your clothes away and start your wardrobe again?
Do you ever feel jealous of your friends?
Do you ever lie to your parents?
Do you ever get really angry with yourself?
Do you ever regret eating something after eating it?
Do you ever wish you could be someone else?
Do you ever think you have bad luck?
Do you ever think studying English is a waste of time?
Do you ever dream about being really, really rich?
Do you ever buy things and then think it was a mistake?
Do you ever give money to charity?
Do you ever forget the names of people you've just met?
Do you ever wish you could be somewhere else?
Do you ever worry about the future of the planet?
Do you ever get confused with all this new technology?
Do you ever think you friends don't like you?
Do you ever think you're the happiest person in the world?
